chapter_title.ar: باب الِاسْتِبْرَاءِ مِنَ الْبَوْلِ وَ غَسْلِهِ وَ مَنْ لَمْ يَجِدِ الْمَاءَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 13 – The Istibra’a from the urine, and washing it, and the one who cannot find the water

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق أو مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/65)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق أو مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/65)
text: بَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) وَ أَنَا قَائِمٌ عَلَى رَأْسِهِ وَ مَعِي إِدَاوَةٌ أَوْ قَالَ كُوزٌ فَلَمَّا انْقَطَعَ شَخْبُ الْبَوْلِ قَالَ بِيَدِهِ هَكَذَا إِلَيَّ فَنَاوَلْتُهُ بِالْمَاءِ فَتَوَضَّأَ مَكَانَهُ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Ibn Fazzal, from Ghalib Bin Usman, from Rawh Bin Abdul Raheem who said,

‘Abu Abdullahasws urinated and I was standing by hisasws head, and with me was a container’, or said, ‘a pitcher. So when the flow of urine stopped, heasws said (gestured) by hisasws hand like this, ‘To measws’. So I gave it to himasws with the water, and heasws performed Ablution (Wudhu) in hisasws place’.
en.sarwar: 8. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn from ibn Faddal from Ghalib ibn ‘Uthman from Rawh ibn ‘Abd al- Rahim who has said the following: “Once, abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, urinated. I was standing nearby with a water container or a jug. When the jet of urine stopped, he (the Imam) made a gesture with his hand for water and I gave it to him and he (the Imam) made Wudu’ at the same place.”
